meaning: n.高射炮,对空炮火,[美俚](剧团,公司等的)宣传员,广告,宣传
examples: Headliners at the event will include David Sanborn, Roberta Flack and Bob James.
"They provide a useful service," said Flack.
"There are huge clusters of organic waste they can feed on," said Flack.
"I don't want some p.r. flack saying this is all just a big misunderstanding, " he said.
Detroit GM Joe Dumars caught little or no flack from bungling the Darko pick.
